_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: this led to a significant reduction in ki-67 positive cells (p < 0.001), reflecting a substantial reduction in proliferation in response to the knockdown
details: PDLIM2 knockdown led to highly statistically significant reduction in Ki-67 positive cells in schwannomas (p < 0.001) and significant reduction in meningiomas (p < 0.05)
